lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਹ ਜਾਨਿਓ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਆਪੁਨਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਤੇ ਭਗਵੰਤ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jih jaanio prabh aapunaa naanak te bhagavant |1|
lines.english: Those who come to know their God, O Nanak, are very fortunate. ||1||
Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਤਿ ਪੂਰੀ ਪਰਧਾਨ ਤੇ ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਮਨ ਮੰਤ ॥
lines.translit: mat pooree paradhaan te gur poore man mant |
lines.english: Perfect is the intellect, and most distinguished is the reputation, of those whose minds are filled with the Mantra of the Perfect Guru.
joining the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.
Pauree:
MAMMA: Those who understand God's mystery are satisfied,

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖ ਸੁਖ ਉਆ ਕੈ ਸਮਤ ਬੀਚਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: dukh sukh uaa kai samat beechaaraa |
lines.english: They look upon pleasure and pain as the same.
They live in the world, and yet they are detached from it.
The Sublime Lord, the Primal Being, is totally pervading each and every heart.
They are exempt from incarnation into heaven or hell.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਆ ਰਸ ਮਹਿ ਉਆਹੂ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: auaa ras meh uaahoo sukh paaeaa |
lines.english: In His Love, they find peace.
Salok:

lines.gurmukhi: ਯਾਰ ਮੀਤ ਸੁਨਿ ਸਾਜਨਹੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਛੂਟਨੁ ਨਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: yaar meet sun saajanahu bin har chhoottan naeh |
lines.english: Listen, my dear friends and companions: without the Lord, there is no salvation.
O Nanak, Maya does not cling to them at all. ||42||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਿਹ ਬੰਧਨ ਕਟੇ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਚਰਨੀ ਪਾਹਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak tih bandhan katte gur kee charanee paeh |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, one who falls at the Feet of the Guru, has his bonds cut away. ||1||
Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕ ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨੁ ਕਹ ਲਉ ਸਿਧੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: ek naam bin keh lau sidheea |
lines.english: but without the One Name, how far can they succeed?
Those efforts, by which emancipation may be attained
YAYYA: People try all sorts of things,

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਆਹਿ ਜਪੇ ਬਿਨੁ ਉਬਰ ਨ ਹੋਊ ॥
lines.translit: auaaeh jape bin ubar na hoaoo |
lines.english: but without meditation, there can be no salvation.
Everyone has this idea of salvation,
The All-powerful Lord is the boat to carry us across.
those efforts are made in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy.
- O Nanak, their intellect is enlightened. ||43||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਬਚ ਕ੍ਰਮ ਜਿਹ ਆਪਿ ਜਨਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: man bach kram jih aap janaaee |
lines.english: Those whom the Lord Himself instructs in thought, word and deed
O Lord, please save these worthless beings!

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੋਸੁ ਨ ਕਾਹੂ ਸੰਗ ਕਰਹੁ ਆਪਨ ਆਪੁ ਬੀਚਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: ros na kaahoo sang karahu aapan aap beechaar |
lines.english: Do not be angry with anyone else; look within your own self instead.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਇ ਨਿਮਾਨਾ ਜਗਿ ਰਹਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਦਰੀ ਪਾਰਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: hoe nimaanaa jag rahahu naanak nadaree paar |1|
lines.english: Be humble in this world, O Nanak, and by His Grace you shall be carried across. ||1||
Salok:
Pauree:
Give up your egotistical pride, and the balance of your account shall be written off.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਰਾ ਰੇਨ ਹੋਤ ਸਭ ਜਾ ਕੀ ॥
lines.translit: raaraa ren hot sabh jaa kee |
lines.english: RARRA: Be the dust under the feet of all.
Your evil ways shall be slowly and steadily blotted out,
Then, you shall win the battle in the Court of the Lord, O Siblings of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਉ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jau guramukh raam naam liv laaee |
lines.english: As Gurmukh, lovingly attune yourself to the Lord's Name.
By the Shabad, the Incomparable Word of the Perfect Guru.
O Nanak, the Lord, the Guru, has given this gift. ||44||
Salok:
You shall be imbued with the Lord's Love, and intoxicated with the Nectar of the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਲਚ ਝੂਠ ਬਿਖੈ ਬਿਆਧਿ ਇਆ ਦੇਹੀ ਮਹਿ ਬਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: laalach jhootth bikhai biaadh eaa dehee meh baas |
lines.english: The afflictions of greed, falsehood and corruption abide in this body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪੀਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੂਖਿ ਨਿਵਾਸ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har har amrit guramukh peea naanak sookh nivaas |1|
lines.english: Drinking in the Ambrosial Nectar of the Lord's Name, Har, Har, O Nanak, the Gurmukh abides in peace. ||1||
LALLA: One who takes the medicine of the Naam, the Name of the Lord,
One whose heart is filled with the medicine of the Naam,
is cured of his pain and sorrow in an instant.
Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਬਿਨੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਨ ਬਨਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: gur poore bin bidh na banaaee |
lines.english: Without the Perfect Guru, no one knows how to prepare it.
is not infested with disease, even in his dreams.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਅਉਖਧੁ ਸਭ ਘਟ ਹੈ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: har aaukhadh sabh ghatt hai bhaaee |
lines.english: The medicine of the Lord's Name is in all hearts, O Siblings of Destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਤਉ ਫਿਰਿ ਦੂਖ ਨ ਥੀਆ ॥੪੫॥
lines.translit: naanak tau fir dookh na theea |45|
lines.english: then, O Nanak, one does not suffer illness again. ||45||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਾਸੁਦੇਵ ਸਰਬਤ੍ਰ ਮੈ ਊਨ ਨ ਕਤਹੂ ਠਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: vaasudev sarabatr mai aoon na katahoo tthaae |
lines.english: The All-pervading Lord is in all places. There is no place where He does not exist.
Salok:
When the Perfect Guru gives the instructions to prepare it,
Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਸੰਗਿ ਹੈ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਾਇ ਦੁਰਾਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: antar baahar sang hai naanak kaae duraae |1|
lines.english: Inside and outside, He is with you. O Nanak, what can be hidden from Him? ||1||
WAWWA: Do not harbor hatred against anyone.
In each and every heart, God is contained.
How rare are those who, by Guru's Grace, sing of Him.
The All-pervading Lord is permeating and pervading the oceans and the land.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵੈਰ ਵਿਰੋਧ ਮਿਟੇ ਤਿਹ ਮਨ ਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: vair virodh mitte tih man te |
lines.english: Hatred and alienation depart from those
who, as Gurmukh, listen to the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises.
O Nanak, one who becomes Gurmukh chants the Name of the Lord,
